item.title: East playoff takeaways: Pistons rout Magic to even series
item.description: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Eastern Conference's first round.

item.title: Rosenior was out of his depth at Chelsea, and it was obvious from the start
item.description: Liam Rosenior never had the aura of a Chelsea manager, but the club hired him anyway. Four months later, the Blues are looking for another new coach.

item.title: If the Premier League did an NFL-style draft, who would each team select?
item.description: In the spirit of NFL draft week, we created a Premier League version with all the drama and intrigue.

item.title: Women's boxing pound-for-pound rankings: Baumgardner closes in on top 5 with win
item.description: Alycia Baumgardner kept her titles and moved up in the rankings. Here's the latest women's pound-for-pound list.

item.title: Our NFL draft-day mock: Yates' final predictions for all 32 picks, plus Kiper's notes
item.description: Field Yates projects the first 32 draft picks one last time -- including a trade -- and Mel Kiper Jr. shares what he's hearing heading into Round 1 (8...
